titleStmt.title: SII 9.594: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 594. (A.R. No. 308 of 1925.) ON A SLAB LYING BY THE SIDE OF THE WALL OF THE GARBHAGRIHA OF THE SIDDHESVARA TEMPLE AT UJJINI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka, 1461, Vikṛiti, Bhādrapada, śu. 12, Maṅgaḷavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1539 August 26, Tuesday. It records the gift of ānandanidhi made by king Achyutarāya-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śāṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśa
kavaruśa 1461 neya vik® rada bhādrapada śu
ddha 12 maṁgaḷavāradalu śrīma rājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīacutarāyamahārāyaru māḍida dānada slōka
śākē caṁdrarasāmarēṁdragaṇatē pakṣē bhādrapadasya prōṣitavidhau
dvādaśyabhikhyē tithau . vārē bhūmisutasya viṣṇvadhipatau tārēcyutakṣmāpatiḥ kṛtvānaṁda
nidhiṁ dvijā(ṁ)ndhanadayaṁnāmōdayanmādhavaṁ . 1 . puṇyaughaiḥ pari
pālitasya paritō bhūtāḷisaṁvēṣṭitāḥ sarvajñaissvavaśīkṛtasya satatākrāṁtā bhu
jaṁgāvrajaiḥ . prāptasyābhinavapraśastimadhikaprakhyātaśauryācyu
takṣmāpānaṁdanidhērnavāpi nidhayaḥ kiṁ tē labhaṁtē tulāṁ [. 2*]
Digital edition of SII 9.594 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
